---
title: "initialise_a_ts_archive"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{initialise_a_ts_archive"}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


## Context: before `process_data` is called
- called in `handle_data`
- after `is_update_update_needed`


## How to write your `process_data` function
- the `process_data` function does not have any params 


### Download the newest version of your data 

### Process s.t. same format as existing dataset

done. 


### Context: after `process_data` is called
- the function `write_open_ts` from the opentimeseries package is used to write the data into the data package. 
- then the GHA pushes the rest
